reference: Hello. If you are experiencing heavy bleeding, then it is likely that your abortion was not complete. You should immediately get an ultrasound scan to determine if the uterus is empty or not. If the uterus is not empty, then you need to address this by removing the products of conception using instruments. If you neglect this, it may lead to sepsis and adverse effects on your health.
text: Hello. If you are experiencing heavy bleeding, then it is likely that your ablation was not complete. You should immediately get a culture sample taken to determine if the uterus is intrauterine loss. If the uterus is not intrauterine, then you need to address this by removing the conception of the intrauterine load. If you neglect this, it may lead to sepsis and adverse effects on your health.
